input_actions.label: Tap tile (first selection)
input_actions.trigger: tap/click on a non-empty, non-locked, non-obstacle tile cell
input_actions.automation: playwright: page.mouse.click(canvas.x + canvas.w * xFrac, canvas.y + canvas.h * yFrac) — xFrac/yFrac derived from grid (row,col) via coordinate formula
input_actions.automation_helper: xFrac = (boardOffset.x + (col + 0.5) * tile_w) / 750 + 0.5;  yFrac = 0.5 - (boardOffset.y + boardH*0.5 - (row+0.5)*tile_h) / 1334 — then scale by canvas bounding box
input_actions.targeting_rule: hit area = full tile bounding box (66×66 design-px). No dead zones. Actual touch target padded conceptually to 80px design-px per Apple HIG, but logical hit = tile cell.
grid_coord_selectable_conditions: tile.isObstacle === false OR obstacle is not selection-blocking (only ice_block and chain_lock block direct selection)
game state is idle (not animating_match, not showing_combo, not game_over)

invalid_action_feedback.already_cleared_cell: no visual or audio response; input silently ignored
invalid_action_feedback.locked_or_obstacle_cell: no response (isLocked=true / ice_block / chain_lock prevents selection); cell appears with lock/ice overlay already rendered
invalid_action_feedback.game_animating: input queued or ignored while animating_match state is active

input_actions.visual_feedback: tile highlight ring (vfx_tile_select_ring) appears within 1 frame (16ms); tile scales up slightly (scale 1.0 → 1.08, tween 80ms ease-out); TileCell.isSelected set to true in TileGrid state

screenshot_checkpoints.normal: tile has default sprite appearance, no highlight ring, scale 1.0
screenshot_checkpoints.selected: tile has highlight ring (coral_warm #E8866A glow), scale 1.08, ring rendered on VFX layer above tile

input_actions.label: Tap tile (second selection — valid match found)
input_actions.trigger: tap/click on a second non-empty tile of the SAME type, with a valid ≤2-bend BFS path (TileMatcher.findPath returns non-null)
input_actions.automation: playwright: sequential page.mouse.click on tile A, then tile B within same test step; no artificial delay required between the two taps
path_validity_rules: BFS path has ≤2 direction turns (TileMatcher enforces turns ≤ 2)
path does not pass through wooden_crate or water_current obstacle cells (ObstacleManager.isPathBlocked)
path may pass through empty cells or outside board boundaries (row/col -1 or =rows/cols)
if Pierce Mode active (BoardEventManager.isPierceMode()), path may route through occupied cells
if portal cells exist, portal exit is injected via ObstacleManager.applyPortalTransform()
visual_feedback: second tile receives select ring for 1 frame before match animation begins

connection line (TileConnectLine layer, z_order 3) drawn along BFS path within 1 frame; line rendered in accent color (glow_yellow #FFE066 or coral_warm #E8866A); line cleared after match animation completes (≤0.3s window)
both matched tiles disappear with particle burst VFX (vfx_tile_disappear_burst) over 0.4s
obstacle hit feedback: if adjacent ice_block, crack overlay progresses one layer; if adjacent weed, weed sprite removed; if adjacent chain_lock, chain ring breaks
input_actions.grid_state_change: TileGrid.clearTile(r1,c1) and TileGrid.clearTile(r2,c2); TILE_GRID_EVENT.TILES_MATCHED emitted with path; ComboTracker.onTileMatched() called; ObstacleManager.onTileMatched([pos1,pos2]) called; BoardEventManager.onMoveMade() called; BoardEventManager.onMatchComplete() called

screenshot_checkpoints.mid_animation: connection line visible over board; both tiles fading; particle burst starting at tile positions
screenshot_checkpoints.success_cleared: both tile cells empty (TileType.NONE), no tile sprites; VFX burst completing; connection line gone

input_actions.label: Tap tile (second selection — invalid path / type mismatch)
input_actions.trigger: tap/click on a tile where TileMatcher.findPath returns null (different type, or no ≤2-bend path, or path blocked by obstacle)
input_actions.automation: playwright: tap tile A (first), then tap tile B of a different type or blocked position; assert shake animation fires and state resets to idle

invalid_action_feedback.type_mismatch: first tile deselects (shake animation, red flash 200ms); audio cue sfx_tile_invalid plays; state resets to idle; second tile tapped becomes first selection of new selection attempt
invalid_action_feedback.no_valid_path: same as type_mismatch — shake + error sound + deselect both tiles; state resets to idle
invalid_action_feedback.second_tap_on_already_selected: deselects the first tile; state resets to idle (toggle deselect behavior)

input_actions.visual_feedback: selected tile(s) shake animation (translate ±4px, 3 oscillations, total duration 200ms); red flash overlay on selected tile (UIOpacity flash 0→200→0 over 200ms)

screenshot_checkpoints.invalid_mid: tile(s) offset by ±4px from center; red flash overlay visible (rgba(255,0,0,0.4))
screenshot_checkpoints.invalid_post: tiles returned to normal position, no selection ring, state reset to idle

input_actions.label: Tap already-selected tile (deselect)
input_actions.trigger: tap/click on the same tile that is currently selected (TileCell.isSelected === true)
input_actions.automation: playwright: tap same selector twice in sequence; assert no match animation fires and state returns to idle
input_actions.visual_feedback: highlight ring removed; tile scales back to 1.0 (tween 80ms); TileCell.isSelected set to false

screenshot_checkpoints.deselected: tile has default appearance, no ring, scale 1.0

input_actions.label: Match a special tile pair
input_actions.input_state_transition: animating_match → idle (after special behavior resolves, except swap which enters swap_selection_active)
input_actions.trigger: second tap selects a matching tile where either tile has specialBlockType set; match path valid; SpecialBlock.trigger() called after clearTile
input_actions.automation: playwright: ensure test board has a known special tile pair; tap both tiles in sequence within the match window

wave.trigger_condition: both tiles have specialBlockType='wave' OR one does and match occurs
wave.activation: on match (WaveBehavior.triggerWithPair called with midpoint of two tile positions)
wave.effect: clears all obstacle layers in 3×3 area around midpoint; grants 5s free-path-zone buff
wave.visual_feedback: 3×3 ripple VFX (vfx_wave_ripple) centered on midpoint cell; obstacle sprites removed within area; 5s buff indicator in HUD

light_chain.effect: finds tile type with most instances; auto-clears all pairs of that type simultaneously
light_chain.visual_feedback: chain lightning VFX (vfx_light_chain_sweep) connecting all auto-cleared pairs; cleared tiles burst simultaneously

pierce.effect: activates Pierce Mode for 8s; BoardEventManager.isPierceMode() returns true; path routing may traverse occupied cells
pierce.visual_feedback: shimmer overlay on board tiles for 8s duration (vfx_pierce_shimmer); HUD pierce buff timer indicator counts down

swap.effect: enters swap_selection_active state; SwapSelectionOverlay layer becomes visible; player picks 2 cells to swap within 10s; BoardEventManager.isSwapSelectionActive() returns true
swap.visual_feedback: SwapSelectionOverlay (z_order 12) activates: non-selectable cells dimmed (alpha 0.6), selectable cells have coral_warm glow ring; 10s countdown timer in overlay
swap.timeout_behavior: after 10s without selection, swap tiles remain on board; overlay dismissed; state returns to idle

cascade.activation: on match (CascadeBehavior.trigger → onCascadeChainStart with maxChains=5, delayMs=300)
cascade.effect: auto-executes up to 5 consecutive matches every 300ms; ComboTracker.onTileMatched() called per auto-match; stops when no valid pair found
cascade.visual_feedback: each auto-matched pair fires vfx_tile_disappear_burst; chain glow animation (vfx_cascade_chain_glow) visible between auto-matches; combo counter increments each step

screenshot_checkpoints.wave_active: 3×3 area around midpoint cleared of obstacles; ripple VFX over that area
screenshot_checkpoints.light_chain_active: lightning VFX connecting all auto-cleared pairs; multiple tile positions empty simultaneously
screenshot_checkpoints.pierce_active: shimmer overlay on board; HUD timer visible
screenshot_checkpoints.swap_overlay_active: SwapSelectionOverlay covers board; non-selectable cells dimmed
screenshot_checkpoints.cascade_step: tiles disappearing sequentially; chain glow between auto-matched positions

input_actions.label: Tap cell during Swap Selection Mode
input_actions.input_state_transition: swap_selection_active → idle (after second cell tapped and swap executed)
input_actions.trigger: tap/click any non-empty cell during the 10-second swap selection window
input_actions.automation: playwright: after swap special match triggers SwapSelectionOverlay, tap two canvas cells within 10s; assert overlay dismissed and tile positions swapped in board state
input_actions.step1: tap first swap target: cell highlights with selected ring; BoardEventManager resolveSwapSelection not yet called
input_actions.step2: tap second swap target: BoardEventManager.resolveSwapSelection(a,b) called; TileGrid.setTile swaps cell contents; overlay dismissed
input_actions.visual_feedback: first tapped cell shows selection ring within SwapSelectionOverlay; second tap triggers swap animation (tiles slide/fade between positions, duration 300ms); overlay dismissed; state returns to idle

screenshot_checkpoints.first_cell_selected: one cell highlighted within SwapSelectionOverlay, overlay still visible
screenshot_checkpoints.swap_complete: overlay dismissed; two tile positions have exchanged sprites; no selection ring

input_actions.label: Tap Hint button in HUD
input_actions.trigger: tap/click the Hint button in GameHUD
input_actions.automation: playwright: page.locator('text=/hint|提示/i').click() OR clickCanvas at HUD hint button position
input_actions.visual_feedback: a valid matchable pair is highlighted with pulsing glow ring (vfx_hint_pulse) for 2s; HUD hint button deactivates (grayed out) for cooldown period

screenshot_checkpoints.hint_active: one valid pair has pulsing highlight rings; HUD hint button grayed

input_actions.label: Tap Pause button in HUD
input_actions.trigger: tap/click the Pause button (z_order 10, GameHUD layer, top-right area, within safe area insets top=44px)
input_actions.automation: playwright: page.locator('text=/pause|暂停/i').click() OR clickCanvas at heuristic HUD top-right (0.9, 0.05)
input_actions.visual_feedback: PauseMenu popup (z_order 20) slides in; backdrop dimmed (alpha 0.7); game loop paused; board input disabled

screenshot_checkpoints.pause_menu_open: PauseMenu panel centered on canvas; backdrop dims all layers; board and HUD dimmed behind popup

combo_system.trigger: each call to ComboTracker.onTileMatched() within 2000ms of the previous match increments comboCount; resets to 1 if gap ≥ 2000ms
combo_system.feedback: ComboLabel in GameHUD (y=+520 design-space) updates with combo count; fanfare sound sfx_combo_N plays (N = comboCount capped at 4 for distinct sounds); bonus display on HUD
combo_system.automation: playwright: rapid sequential taps on valid tile pairs, each tap ≤1800ms after the previous match animation completes (to stay within 2000ms window); assert ComboLabel text increments

board_rotate_warning.visual_feedback: camera/canvas shake (max amplitude 8px, duration 0.3s per view-mode-runtime-contract camera.camera_shake); affected board sub-rectangle flashes red border
board_rotate_warning.automation: playwright: make N consecutive moves (N = every_n_moves from level config); assert shake animation fires within 1 frame

board_rotate_execute.visual_feedback: sub-rectangle tiles animate rotating 90° clockwise (tween duration 0.4s); boardRotateExecuted event emitted on TileGrid
board_rotate_execute.automation: playwright: wait for rotate animation to complete; assert tile positions in sub-rectangle match expected 90° CW rotation

water_flow_shift.visual_feedback: affected row/column tiles slide in shift direction (translate animation, 0.3s ease-in-out); waterFlowShifted event emitted
water_flow_shift.automation: playwright: wait interval_s + 0.5s; assert tile at known position has shifted

vine_spread.visual_feedback: new vine/moss overlay appears on one adjacent cell; vineSpread event emitted; cell isLocked=true
vine_spread.automation: playwright: wait 10s+ with vine_spread event active; assert one new cell has vine overlay

cell_unfrozen.trigger: FreezeZone hit count reaches required_hits after adjacent match(es)
cell_unfrozen.visual_feedback: ice crack overlay progresses layer by layer (ice_crack_1 → ice_crack_2 → cleared); cellUnfrozen event emitted; cell becomes selectable
cell_unfrozen.automation: playwright: match tiles adjacent to ice_block cell N times (required_hits times); assert ice overlay removed and cell selectable

pierce_mode_active.trigger: BoardEventManager.handlePierceBuff(8) called after pierce tile match
pierce_mode_active.visual_feedback: shimmer overlay on all board tiles; path-finding allows routing through occupied cells during this window
pierce_mode_active.automation: playwright: match pierce tiles; within 8s, attempt a match that would normally be blocked by occupied cells; assert match succeeds

swap_selection_timeout.trigger: swap 10s window expires without player selecting two cells
swap_selection_timeout.visual_feedback: SwapSelectionOverlay dismissed; swap tiles remain on board at original positions; flash feedback indicating timeout
swap_selection_timeout.automation: playwright: match swap tiles; wait 10.5s without any input; assert SwapSelectionOverlay gone and tile positions unchanged

ice_block.selection_behavior: ice_block cell cannot be directly selected (isLocked=true / isObstacle=true); tap on ice_block cell: no feedback (silent ignore)
ice_block.damage_feedback: each adjacent match to ice_block cell reduces layers (ObstacleManager._handleAdjacentIceBlock); layer 3→2: crack overlay stage 1; layer 2→1: crack overlay stage 2; layer 1→0: ice shatters (vfx_ice_shatter), cell becomes selectable
ice_block.automation: playwright: match tiles adjacent to a known ice_block cell; assert visual layer indicator changes per hit

chain_lock.selection_behavior: chain_lock cell CAN be selected (isLocked may be true but direct match allowed); each direct match reduces chains counter; tile survives until chains=0
chain_lock.damage_feedback: chain ring break animation per direct match; all chains broken: tile clears normally
chain_lock.automation: playwright: match chain_lock cell N times (chains count); assert cell clears after Nth match

weed.selection_behavior: weed cell is an obstacle; adjacent match clears weed in one hit
weed.damage_feedback: weed sprite disappears with wilt animation (vfx_weed_wilt) on adjacent match
weed.automation: playwright: match any tile adjacent to a weed cell; assert weed overlay removed after match

wooden_crate.selection_behavior: wooden_crate blocks path traversal (ObstacleManager.isPathBlocked returns true); cannot be cleared by adjacent match
wooden_crate.feedback: if player attempts a match whose only valid path goes through wooden_crate, TileMatcher.findPath returns null → invalid match feedback (shake + sfx_tile_invalid)
wooden_crate.automation: playwright: attempt to match two tiles whose only route crosses a wooden_crate; assert invalid feedback fires

water_current.selection_behavior: water_current blocks path traversal; direction changes every 5s (ObstacleManager.updateWaterCurrent)
water_current.direction_change_feedback: water_current sprite animates to new flow direction; direction arrow changes; audio sfx_water_gurgle
water_current.automation: playwright: wait 5s; assert water_current direction indicator has changed

portal.selection_behavior: portal cells are not matchable directly; path BFS uses getPortalPartner() for zero-cost teleport traversal
portal.feedback: when a path uses a portal, the connection line renders an arc or jump animation at the portal cells (portal entry → portal exit segment); audio sfx_portal_traverse
portal.automation: playwright: set up two tiles connected only via portal; tap both; assert match succeeds and connection line shows portal jump

spreading_obstacle.selection_behavior: spread cells set isLocked=true on underlying tile via TileGrid.setTile; cannot be selected
spreading_obstacle.spread_feedback: new vine/moss cell appears with grow animation per BoardEventManager vineSpread event / ObstacleManager.tickSpread
spreading_obstacle.clear_feedback: adjacent match clears one spread cell (ObstacleManager._handleAdjacentSpread); cleared with wilt VFX
spreading_obstacle.automation: playwright: match tile adjacent to spreading_obstacle cell; assert that cell cleared

coordinate_automation_formula.description: Convert grid (row, col) to Playwright canvas fraction (xFrac, yFrac) for page.mouse.click()

formula.playwright_click: page.mouse.click(canvas.x + canvas.width * xFrac, canvas.y + canvas.height * yFrac)

coordinate_automation_formula.notes: Canvas design resolution 750×1334. Board at (0,-30) design-space. Y-up in Cocos world space; Y-down in screen/canvas space. xFrac = (375 + world_x) / 750. yFrac = (667 - world_y) / 1334.

feedback_latency_requirements.note: All primary feedback (highlight ring, select audio) must fire within one frame (≤16ms at 60fps). Match animations ≤400ms. Combo fanfare within 100ms of match confirmation.

required_new_test_cases.description: Idle tap on valid tile: assert highlight ring visible and isSelected=true within 16ms
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas(page, xFrac_tile_A, yFrac_tile_A); assert visual state change via screenshot comparison or canvas data

required_new_test_cases.description: Valid two-tile match: assert connection line appears, tiles disappear, state returns to idle
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas tile A; clickCanvas tile B (same type, valid path); waitForTimeout(400); assert both positions are empty

required_new_test_cases.description: Invalid second-tile tap (type mismatch): assert shake animation fires and state resets to idle
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas tile A (type T01); clickCanvas tile C (type T02); assert shake class or animation duration; assert next tap starts fresh selection

required_new_test_cases.description: Deselect by re-tapping selected tile: assert ring removed and state is idle
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas tile A; clickCanvas tile A again; assert no second selection pending

required_new_test_cases.description: Combo system: 3 sequential matches within 2s window each: assert combo counter reaches 3 and multiplier is 2.0
required_new_test_cases.automation: three rapid clickCanvas pairs (each valid match); waitForTimeout(150) between each; assert ComboLabel shows ×2 or 3

required_new_test_cases.description: Special tile — WAVE: match two wave tiles; assert 3×3 obstacle clear and wave buff active
required_new_test_cases.automation: setup board with known wave tiles; tap pair; waitForTimeout(500); assert obstacle cells in 3×3 area cleared

required_new_test_cases.description: Special tile — SWAP: match swap tiles; assert SwapSelectionOverlay visible; tap two cells; assert tile swap executed
required_new_test_cases.automation: match swap tiles; assert overlay visible; clickCanvas cell A; clickCanvas cell B; waitForTimeout(400); assert positions exchanged

required_new_test_cases.description: SWAP timeout: match swap tiles; wait 10.5s without input; assert overlay dismissed and tiles unchanged
required_new_test_cases.automation: match swap tiles; page.waitForTimeout(10500); assert overlay gone; assert tile positions unchanged

required_new_test_cases.description: Tap on ice_block cell: assert no selection occurs (silent ignore)
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas on known ice_block position; assert no selection ring visible

required_new_test_cases.description: Adjacent match clears ice_block layer: match tile next to ice_block; assert crack overlay changes stage
required_new_test_cases.automation: clickCanvas pair adjacent to ice_block; waitForTimeout(500); assert ice visual layer changed

required_new_test_cases.description: Path blocked by wooden_crate: attempt match only routable through crate; assert invalid feedback fires
required_new_test_cases.automation: tap two tiles whose only BFS path crosses a wooden_crate; assert shake + sfx_tile_invalid; assert no tiles cleared

required_new_test_cases.description: Board rotate warning: make N moves (every_n_moves); assert warning flash fires before rotation executes
required_new_test_cases.automation: configure board with board_rotate event every_n_moves=3; make 3 matches; assert warning visual; wait 1s; assert rotation occurred

validation_notes: All 8 action_ids cover the complete input_states enum transitions: idle, first_tile_selected, second_tile_selected, animating_match, showing_combo, swap_selection_active, game_over.
Feedback latency 16ms (1 frame at 60fps) derived from view-mode-runtime-contract feedback_latency_ms baseline.
All 5 special block types (wave, light_chain, pierce, swap, cascade) have trigger conditions, visual/audio feedback, and automation steps derived from SpecialBlock.ts behavior classes.
Combo system: COMBO_WINDOW_MS=2000ms, COMBO_MAX=6, multiplier thresholds sourced from ComboTracker.ts constants.
Special block auto-generation thresholds (cascade=3, light_chain=4, wave=6) sourced from SPECIAL_BLOCK_GENERATION_COMBO in SpecialBlock.ts.

Obstacle interaction coverage: ice_block (layers 1-3, adjacent damage), chain_lock (direct match, multi-hit), weed (1-hit adjacent), wooden_crate (path blocker), water_current (path blocker, 5s direction change), portal (zero-cost traversal), spreading_obstacle (1-hit adjacent clear) — all sourced from ObstacleManager.ts.
Board event feedback: board_rotate_warning (1s flash, then rotate), water_flow_shift (5s periodic), vine_spread (10s periodic), cell_unfrozen — all sourced from BoardEventManager.ts.
Coordinate automation formula derived from view-mode-runtime-contract coordinate_conversion.grid_to_board_local and grid_to_canvas_world formulas (tile_w=528/cols, board at y=-30).
12 new automation test cases defined in validation_automation_suite, extending existing glow-island.spec.ts test structure.
SwapSelectionOverlay layer z_order=12 and visual spec sourced from view-mode-runtime-contract.layers[SwapSelectionOverlay].
Touch target minimum 88px design-px (Apple HIG 44pt at 2x) noted; tile hit area 66px design-px (functional for tile-sized targets; no HIG gap for tiles per readability_rules.tile_touch_target).
